'''鈭歮-z-dh-n''' ('''kamazdhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coanalyse|coanalyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coanalyse|coanalyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-z-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kamazdhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimazdhenoko|thimazdhenoko]] || [[word:jimazdhenoko|jimazdhenoko]] || [[word:shimazdhenoko|shimazdhenoko]] || [[word:kimazdhenoko|kimazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumazdhenoko|thuthumazdhenoko]] || [[word:jujumazdhenoko|jujumazdhenoko]] || [[word:shushumazdhenoko|shushumazdhenoko]] || [[word:kukumazdhenoko|kukumazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumazdhenoko|thumazdhenoko]] || [[word:jumazdhenoko|jumazdhenoko]] || [[word:shumazdhenoko|shumazdhenoko]] || [[word:kumazdhenoko|kumazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumazdhenoko|thumazdhenoko]] || [[word:jumazdhenoko|jumazdhenoko]] || [[word:shumazdhenoko|shumazdhenoko]] || [[word:kumazdhenoko|kumazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themazdhenoko|themazdhenoko]] || [[word:jemazdhenoko|jemazdhenoko]] || [[word:shemazdhenoko|shemazdhenoko]] || [[word:kemazdhenoko|kemazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomazdhenoko|thothomazdhenoko]] || [[word:jojomazdhenoko|jojomazdhenoko]] || [[word:shoshomazdhenoko|shoshomazdhenoko]] || [[word:kokomazdhenoko|kokomazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomazdhenoko|thomazdhenoko]] || [[word:jomazdhenoko|jomazdhenoko]] || [[word:shomazdhenoko|shomazdhenoko]] || [[word:komazdhenoko|komazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomazdhenoko|thomazdhenoko]] || [[word:jomazdhenoko|jomazdhenoko]] || [[word:shomazdhenoko|shomazdhenoko]] || [[word:komazdhenoko|komazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mazdhenoko|th忙mazdhenoko]] || [[word:j忙mazdhenoko|j忙mazdhenoko]] || [[word:sh忙mazdhenoko|sh忙mazdhenoko]] || [[word:k忙mazdhenoko|k忙mazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamazdhenoko|thathamazdhenoko]] || [[word:jajamazdhenoko|jajamazdhenoko]] || [[word:shashamazdhenoko|shashamazdhenoko]] || [[word:kakamazdhenoko|kakamazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamazdhenoko|thamazdhenoko]] || [[word:jamazdhenoko|jamazdhenoko]] || [[word:shamazdhenoko|shamazdhenoko]] || [[word:kamazdhenoko|kamazdhenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamazdhenoko|thamazdhenoko]] || [[word:jamazdhenoko|jamazdhenoko]] || [[word:shamazdhenoko|shamazdhenoko]] || [[word:kamazdhenoko|kamazdhenoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
